mapper.select: select issue_status_id, user_id, status_name, status_answer, closed_yn from issue_status where user_id = #{userId} order by issue_status_id ASC
select issue_status_id, user_id, status_name, status_answer, closed_yn from issue_status where issue_status_id = #{issueStatusId} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert:
select 'ISSUE_STATUS_' || to_char(sysdate, 'YYMM') || '_' || lpad( nvl(max(to_number(substr(issue_status_id, -4))), 0) + 1, 4, '0' ) from issue_status where substr(issue_status_id, 1, 18) = 'ISSUE_STATUS_' || to_char(sysdate, 'YYMM') || '_'
insert into issue_status ( issue_status_id, user_id, status_name, status_answer, closed_yn ) values ( #{issueStatusId}, #{userId}, #{statusName}, #{statusAnswer}, #{closedYn} )
